source.name: Belgian Immigration Office (IBZ) — Sufficient means of subsistence

requirements.label: Enrolment at a recognised institution
requirements.detail: Admission/enrolment at a recognised Belgian higher-education institution.

requirements.label: Means of subsistence
requirements.detail: Show about €1,062/month (2026-27 level), normally for a full year (≈ €12,744) — via own funds or an Annex 32 sponsor.

requirements.label: Health insurance
requirements.detail: Insurance covering your stay in Belgium.

requirements.label: Language proof
requirements.detail: Dutch/French for local-language programmes, or IELTS/TOEFL for English-taught.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the long-stay (type D) visa period.

requirements.label: Medical certificate
requirements.detail: A medical certificate is usually required for the long-stay visa.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Belgian number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Arrange housing early in Brussels, Leuven, Ghent or Antwerp.
